creator: leeym@db1.leeym.com
text:
Implement new variables, PERL_DEPENDS, PERL_TEST_DEPENDS, and P5PORTER.

Based on the discussion on freebsd-perl@ with some modifications.
See http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-perl/2008-February/001750.html

The difference - I try to keep it simple and stupid (somehow backward compatible)

Fix: Two files:

- bsd.perl.core.mk
    Module versions in core. Generated from Module::CoreList

- bsd.perl.mk
    Add supports from PERL_DEPENDS, PERL_TEST_DEPENDS and P5PORTER
How-To-Repeat: 
Pick one port, rewrite its BUILD_DEPENDS and RUN_DEPENDS with new syntax.
For example, devel/p5-Module-ScanDeps

PERL_DEPENDS=   Encode>=0:${PORTSDIR}/converters/p5-Encode \
                File::Spec>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-PathTools \
                File::Temp>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-File-Temp \
                Module::Build::ModuleInfo>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Module-Build \
                base>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-base \
                version>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-version

PERL_TEST_DEPENDS=      Data::Dumper>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Data-Dumper \
                Module::Pluggable>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Module-Pluggable \
                Test::More>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Simple

$ make -V PERL_LEVEL
500808

$ make -V PERL_DEPENDS
Encode>=0:/usr/ports/converters/p5-Encode  File::Spec>=0:/usr/ports/devel/p5-PathTools  File::Temp:/usr/ports/devel/p5-File-Temp  Module::Build::ModuleInfo:/usr/ports/devel/p5-Module-Build  base:/usr/ports/devel/p5-base  version>=0:/usr/ports/devel/p5-version

$ make -V PERL_TEST_DEPENDS
Data::Dumper>=0:/usr/ports/devel/p5-Data-Dumper  Module::Pluggable>=0:/usr/ports/devel/p5-Module-Pluggable  Test::More>=0:/usr/ports/devel/p5-Test-Simple

$ make -V BUILD_DEPENDS
 /nonexistent:/usr/ports/devel/p5-Module-Build /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach/version.pm:/usr/ports/devel/p5-version /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.8:/usr/ports/lang/perl5.8

$ make -V RUN_DEPENDS
 /nonexistent:/usr/ports/devel/p5-Module-Build /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach/version.pm:/usr/ports/devel/p5-version /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.8:/usr/ports/lang/perl5.8

$ env P5PORTER=yes make -V BUILD_DEPENDS
 /nonexistent:/usr/ports/devel/p5-Module-Build /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach/version.pm:/usr/ports/devel/p5-version /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Module/Pluggable.pm:/usr/ports/devel/p5-Module-Pluggable /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.8:/usr/ports/lang/perl5.8

$ make -V _perl_core_Encode
2.12

$ make -V _perl_core_Test_More
0.62
